creator: kikadf.01@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Thomas Zander from comment #1)
I opened a bug to bump smplayer version and use Qt5 as default.
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=231856

Should  I set that bug as depend of this? 

I opened another smplayer relevant bug too, bump smplayer-themes:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=231854

Thanks your review.
